action_set_definitions.name: get_listing_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current metadata, content, and system signals for a specific listing.

listing_id.description: The unique identifier of the product listing.

action_set_definitions.name: get_moderation_history
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the internal log of all previous actions, takedown notices, and status changes for a listing.

listing_id.description: The unique identifier of the product listing.

history.details: Japanese domestic model, restricted firmware, no domestic warranty.

action_set_definitions.name: message_seller
action_set_definitions.description: Sends a formal inquiry to the seller to request documentation or clarify listing details.

listing_id.description: The unique identifier of the product listing.

subject.description: The reason for contact (e.g., 'Supply Chain Verification').

body.description: The detailed message asking for specific proofs or disclosures.

action_set_definitions.name: retrieve_seller_communications
action_set_definitions.description: Fetches the latest messages and uploaded documents sent by the seller in response to inquiries.

listing_id.description: The unique identifier of the product listing.

messages.content: Here is the invoice for the stock.

action_set_definitions.name: update_listing_status
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the final moderation status of the listing (e.g., APPROVED, REJECTED).

listing_id.description: The unique identifier of the product listing.

resolution_note.description: A summary of why this decision was reached.

action_set_definitions.name: set_policy_flags
action_set_definitions.description: Applies specific internal risk and policy tags to a listing for future monitoring.

listing_id.description: The unique identifier of the product listing.

state_description.listing_id: Unique identifier for the product listing being moderated.
state_description.moderation_status: The current workflow stage of the listing (e.g., PENDING_REVIEW, APPROVED, REJECTED, FLAGGED, ESCALATED).
state_description.listing_content: The text and metadata submitted by the seller, including title, description, and price.
state_description.risk_signals: Automated system flags or keywords detected (e.g., 'replica', 'counterfeit').
state_description.moderation_history: Internal log of all actions taken on this listing by various agents or systems.

listing_content.title: Nikon Z9 Flagship Mirrorless Camera - New
listing_content.description: The Nikon Z9 is a professional-grade mirrorless camera featuring a 45.7MP sensor. Brand new in box with all original accessories.

moderation_history.note: Notice & Takedown filed by Nikon Americas. Claim: Parallel Import with material differences (Firmware language lock to Japanese / No US warranty coverage).
